custom.name: accessibility_audit
custom.description: Check that all images have alt attributes and forms have associated labels

custom.name: bundle_size_check
custom.description: Verify the production bundle first-load JS stays under 200KB

custom_roles.name: i18n-specialist
custom_roles.trigger: test -d src/locales || test -d public/locales || grep -q 'next-intl\|react-i18next\|i18n' package.json
custom_roles.prompt: You are an internationalization specialist. Audit translation files for missing keys across locales, ensure all user-facing strings are extracted (no hardcoded text in components), validate locale fallback chains, and check that date/number formatting uses the i18n library rather than raw toLocaleString calls.

custom_rules.name: no_console_log_in_components
custom_rules.message: console.log statements found in React components — remove or replace with a proper logger.

custom_rules.name: env_example_in_sync
custom_rules.message: .env.example and .env.local have mismatched variable names — keep them in sync.
